name: XPG Defender Mid Tower Gaming Chassis (White)
highlights: XPG VENTO PC Case offers exceptional versatility and cooling potential with its sleek black or white design, durable SGCC construction, and tempered glass side panel
Supporting motherboards from Mini-ITX to EEB, it features three pre-installed XPG VENTO 120mm fans, extensive radiator and fan compatibility, and tool-free drive bays
With ample clearance for high-end GPUs and CPU coolers, plus modern I/O ports, the XPG VENTO is perfect for gamers and PC enthusiasts aiming for a high-performance, customizable build
description: XPG Defender Mid Tower Gaming Chassis (White) Price in Pakistan Category Specification Product Name XPG VENTO PC Case Dimensions 492 x 220 x 441 mm (19.37 x 8.66 x 17.36 inches) Color Options Black / White (Exterior & Interior) Material SGCC Side Panel 3mm Tempered Glass Motherboard Support Mini-ITX, Micro-ATX, ATX, E-ATX, CEB, EEB 3.5″ Drive Bays 2 2.5″ Drive Bays 2 + 2 (Combo 3.5”/2.5”) I/O Ports 2 × USB 3.0, 1 × Hybrid Audio Port Pre-installed Fans Front: 2 × XPG VENTO 120mmRe
